channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLmindYourBusiness

item.title: Handling People That Are Ghostlighting You Is Easier When You Lean Into Generative AI Such As ChatGPT For Help
item.description: New trend is ghostlighting, which is ghosting plus gaslighting. Be on the watch. AI can help you. Examples shown. An AI Insider scoop.

item.title: Pico Announces New Meta Quest 3 Rival Headset, Project Swan
item.description: Project Swan is the current name for Pico's upcoming flagship VR headset, which uses technology similar to that of Apple's high-end Vision Pro.
